text.tspan: RTX 4090, FP32, 64 channels, avg. directed degree 16. Each point is the fastest successful run over (,)∈{(1,2),(2,3)}; compiled = make_fx for training and AOTI for inference. Atom counts/throughput are converted from directed edges assuming 50 directed neighbors per atom.
